name: Lumpat
description:
Why: Need for an efficient running event management system, especially for accurate timing equipment and live leaderboards.

How: As CTO, I co-developed a digital ecosystem for event management, handling high traffic and real-time timing integration.

What: A comprehensive running events platform that successfully supported 5 large-scale events with 5,000 participants.

name: CariProject
description: Freelance marketplace using Django, PostgreSQL, Docker, and Google Auth. Integrated Midtrans payment gateway and an admin dashboard.

name: Hawa
description:
Why: Need for accessible and inclusive early weather warnings, as part of a youth development program supported by BMKG.

How: Developed a multilingual real-time weather dashboard using FastAPI, Vite React, Tailwind CSS, and OpenMeteo API, integrating WhatsApp for automated disaster alerts.

What: An innovative weather dashboard that led our team to become YDCT finalists and present the project in Singapore.

name: Prenava
description:
Why: Concerns about maternal and child health and the lack of a comprehensive app to help pregnant women monitor their daily conditions.

How: Collaborated on an integrated ecosystem using Laravel (Backend), React (Web), and Flutter (Mobile), implementing Machine Learning for a smart pregnancy tracker.

What: A mobile app (released on Play Store) featuring pregnancy monitoring, community forums, and a maternal and child shop.

name: SIKAP (Kementerian Agama)
description: System enhancement for Kementerian Agama. Diagnosed defects, refactored modules, and enforced code-quality standards with SonarQube.

name: IT Governance - COBIT 2019
description: COBIT 2019 design, gap analysis, and audit-ready scoring deliverables for PT Pegadaian Bandung.
